OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The scope of the connector (observable types to enrich).

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_AUTO.description: Whether the connector should run automatically when an entity is created or updated.

PALOALTO_WILDFIRE_API_KEY.description: Palo Alto Networks WildFire API key.

PALOALTO_WILDFIRE_API_BASE_URL.description: WildFire API base URL (cloud region or appliance).

PALOALTO_WILDFIRE_SUBMIT_UNKNOWN.description: Submit unknown files (carried by the observable) to WildFire for analysis when no verdict exists yet. Disabled by default (opt-in): submission uploads the sample to WildFire.

PALOALTO_WILDFIRE_MAX_FILE_SIZE.description: Maximum size (in bytes) of a file the connector will download from OpenCTI and submit to WildFire.

PALOALTO_WILDFIRE_SUBMISSION_TIMEOUT.description: Maximum time (in seconds) to wait for a submitted file's verdict before giving up.

PALOALTO_WILDFIRE_MAX_TLP.description: Maximum TLP of the observable the connector is allowed to enrich.
